summary: Hydrated state shows the original representative #67544 is already closed as implemented. The best current open canonical for the remaining Windows Scheduled Task restart failure family is #90158. The other open original candidates remain related but not duplicate-cleanup safe because they carry distinct active-run drain, mixed restart-health, or hot-reload crash-loop details. No GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Current open canonical for the unresolved Windows Scheduled Task self-restart / relaunch failure family.
Related to the canonical Windows restart family, but it contains distinct active-task/session-state and product-decision scope, so it should not be closed as a duplicate.
Related to #90158, but broader and mixed-symptom enough that duplicate closure would risk losing unique restart-health and post-ready behavior.
Related to the canonical Windows restart failure, but hot-reload plus stale lock/EADDRINUSE is distinct enough to keep open.
Already closed as implemented; included only to account for the original candidate list.
Original representative is closed and no longer the live canonical; included only to account for the original candidate list.
